name: Event Registration and Waiver Form
description: A form to collect participant details, secure GDPR/data consent, and obtain liability and media release waivers for an event.
content:
{{event_name}} REGISTRATION & WAIVER FORM

Event Date(s): {{event_date}}

Location/Platform: {{event_location}}

Organizer: {{organizer_name}}

PARTICIPANT INFORMATION

Full Name: {{participant_name}}

Email Address: {{participant_email}}

Phone Number: {{participant_phone}}

{{#if participant_organization}}

Organization/School: {{participant_organization}}

{{/if}} {{#if emergency_contact_name}}

Emergency Contact: {{emergency_contact_name}} (Relationship: {{emergency_contact_relation}}, Tel: {{emergency_contact_phone}})

{{/if}}

TERMS OF PARTICIPATION & LIABILITY WAIVER

By signing this document, I acknowledge, understand, and agree to the following:

  • I will adhere to all event rules, schedules, and instructions provided by the Organizer.
  • I am solely responsible for my own safety, well-being, and personal belongings during the event.
  • Liability Waiver: I hereby release and hold harmless the Organizer from any liability, claims, or demands for personal injury, illness, or property damage arising out of my participation in the event, except in cases of gross negligence.
  • {{#if (eq data_consent 'Yes')}}Data Privacy (GDPR): I explicitly consent to the collection and processing of my personal data for event management, communication, and updates.{{else}}I have been informed about the data privacy policy, but I do not consent to my data being used for marketing purposes.{{/if}}
  • {{#if (eq media_consent 'Yes')}}Media Release: I grant the Organizer permission to photograph and record me during the event, and to use these images/videos for promotional, marketing, and archival purposes globally without compensation.{{else}}Media Opt-Out: I do NOT grant permission to be photographed or recorded for promotional purposes during the event.{{/if}}

Participant Name: {{participant_name}}

Date: {{formatDate date_signed}}


Signature: _________________________


Signing this form constitutes full acceptance of the terms and conditions outlined above.

fields.name: data_consent
fields.label: Do you consent to Data Processing (GDPR)?

fields.name: media_consent
fields.label: Do you grant a Photo/Video Media Release?
